---
title: "README"
output: md_document
date: "2025-10-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# BayesCOOP

The repository contains the analysis codes from the Bayesian coopertive project.

## Dependencies

`BayesCOOP` requires the following `R` packages: `devtools` (for installation only), `caret`, `rmutil`, `MCMCpack`. Please install these before installing `BayesCOOP`, which can be done as follows (execute from within a fresh R session):

```r
install.packages("devtools")
library(devtools)
```
